skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: Transform ideas into validated decisions through structured, scope-adaptive collaborative dialogue across all domains: software, product, business strategy, market analysis, and open-ended exploration. Features domain-adaptive thinking frameworks, five universal thinking moves, and proportional output formats.

skills.name: business-plan
skills.description: Comprehensive business planning, financial analysis, market analysis, pitch deck creation, strategic review, and valuation. Adapts to business stage (idea through mature) and scale (solopreneur through enterprise).

skills.name: deep-research
skills.description: Conduct comprehensive, citation-backed web research with multi-phase pipeline, parallel execution, anti-hallucination protocols, and structured report generation.
